Class UserRepositoryImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service.repository.UserRepositoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
UserRepository
@Singleton public class UserRepositoryImpl extends Object implements UserRepository
Implementation of UserRepository providing user data operations. Uses Room database for data persistence and CompletableFuture for asynchronous operations.

  • Method Summary

    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    delete(User user)
    Deletes a user from the database.

    Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.

    Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
    CompletableFuture<User>
    save(User user)
    Saves or updates a user in the database.

  • Method Details

    • save

      public CompletableFuture<User> save(User user)
      Description copied from interface: UserRepository
      Saves or updates a user in the database.
      Specified by:
      save in interface UserRepository
      Parameters:
      user - User entity to save.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the saved User with generated ID.

    • getById

      public LiveData<User> getById(long id)
      Description copied from interface: UserRepository
      Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      getById in interface UserRepository
      Parameters:
      id - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the User, or null if not found.

    • getByOauthKey

      public LiveData<User> getByOauthKey(String oauthKey)
      Description copied from interface: UserRepository
      Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
      Specified by:
      getByOauthKey in interface UserRepository
      Parameters:
      oauthKey - OAuth authentication key.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the User, or null if not found.

    • delete

      public CompletableFuture<Void> delete(User user)
      Description copied from interface: UserRepository
      Deletes a user from the database.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface UserRepository
      Parameters:
      user - User entity to delete.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture that completes when deletion is finished.
